name: Plumbing Contractor — T2125, ZEV CCA (Class 54), and Apprentice Tax Credit
description: Complete Marc Tremblay's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. His tax documents and business scenario are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\. Save the completed return as 'marc_tremblay.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income) 2024; CRA Form T2038(IND)
metadata.key_complexity: T2125 business expenses; Class 54 Zero-Emission Vehicle CCA; Form T2038(IND) Apprenticeship Job Creation Tax Credit calculation
